verdict.answer_first: A and B both answer immediately with Flexbox; B's first line says "The cleanest modern way is Flexbox on the parent" and gives the CSS right away.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits clearly to "The cleanest modern way" and later says "For most cases, reach for Flexbox" while still noting alternatives.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it adds the crucial vertical-centering caveat: "the parent needs a height (e.g. height: 100vh)" plus minimal HTML context.
